meta.notes: Phase 1 draft test plan and CI expectations. | Phase 2: updated open-questions list; tests unchanged.

purpose: Define test coverage needed to prevent data integrity and demo failures for the Gut–Brain Simulator app.

test_levels.scope: CSV parsing/mapping, stats computation, deterministic hashing
Simulation execution with persisted runs; export generation
Wording/disclaimer audit for non-diagnostic and non-causal phrasing

test_cases.title: Pilot CSV column mapping and numeric validation
test_cases.objective: Reject invalid CSVs and correctly map duplicated columns (Diet Score.*) to canonical fields.
steps: Load Data Sheet 1.csv.
Apply default column mapping.
Assert row_count == 66 and all canonical numeric fields parse.
test_cases.expected_result: Ingestion succeeds with row_count=66 and produces canonical columns diet_score, stroop_test, language_test, memory_test, logical_test, overall_score.

evidence.snippet: File contains 66 rows of pilot data with diet score and cognitive tests (Stroop, Language, Memory, Logical, Overall).

test_cases.title: Pilot stats and correlation computation
test_cases.objective: Compute summary stats and correlations without errors.
steps: Using canonical pilot records, compute mean/median for each metric.
Compute correlation between diet_score and each test.
test_cases.expected_result: Stats and correlations computed; NaNs handled deterministically.

test_cases.title: Simulation determinism
test_cases.objective: Same inputs + model_version produce identical outputs and run_hash.
steps: Run simulation twice with identical inputs and explicit model_version_id.
Compare outputs and run_hash.

test_cases.title: Judge walkthrough flow
test_cases.objective: Ensure the presenter can complete Flow-01 without blockers.
steps: Open app in fresh session.
Navigate Dashboard → Pilot Results → Methods & Rigor → Simulator → Export.
Generate an export.
test_cases.expected_result: No authentication prompt; all screens load; export completes.

test_cases.title: Export content completeness
test_cases.objective: Export includes required sections and disclaimers.
steps: Generate export for a simulation run.
Parse/export preview to verify required sections present.
test_cases.expected_result: Report includes: inputs, outputs, pilot visuals, leakage notes, disclaimer, run_id/model_version.

test_cases.title: Non-diagnostic and proxy labeling audit
test_cases.objective: Verify UI wording avoids causal/diagnostic claims.
steps: Review Methods & Rigor page.
Review Simulator outputs labels.
test_cases.expected_result: Disclaimer present; outputs labeled simulated/proxy; no 'proves' language.

test_cases.title: Help/Docs index load + renderer smoke test
test_cases.objective: Verify docs_index loads, list is non-empty, and renderer supports JSON/CSV/MD/TXT offline.
steps: Load the app in offline mode (no network).
Open Help/Docs (SCR-007).
Assert docs_index loads and contains expected key items (e.g., gui_spec.json, user_requirements.json, brd.json, pilot_dataset_n66.csv).
Open one JSON doc and verify pretty formatting renders.
Open pilot_dataset_n66.csv and verify table preview renders.
Open a Markdown doc (e.g., reference/README_data_build.md) and verify markdown renders.
Open a TXT doc (external_sources_for_Gut_overview.txt) and verify text renders.
test_cases.expected_result: All document types render correctly without network and without runtime errors.

ci_commands.notes: cannot confirm CI commands until tech stack is finalized (ASM-001).

coverage_expectations.unit: Core data parsing and deterministic hashing must be covered.
coverage_expectations.integration: Simulation and export must be covered with at least one golden test.
coverage_expectations.e2e: At least one judge-walkthrough smoke test.
